meta.title: DXFlow - The operating system for work
meta.description: Management and operations automation software for small and medium businesses in Vietnam.

hero.title: Manage and automate operations for Vietnamese businesses
hero.subtitle: DXFlow unifies sales, inventory and customers, and automates repetitive work — so your team does less manual work, makes fewer mistakes, and focuses on growth.
hero.imgAlt: DXFlow dashboard showing business operations metrics

features.title: One platform, replacing a pile of disconnected tools
features.subtitle: Instead of juggling separate apps, DXFlow brings all your operations into one place and automates the repetitive parts.

items.title: Automation
items.description: Run repetitive tasks, automate approval flows and internal reminders, cutting manual work every day.

items.title: Reports & Analytics
items.description: Consolidate sales, inventory and customer data in real time so you can make decisions based on data.

items.title: Connect & Sync
items.description: Deep integration with Vietnam's ecosystem: Sapo, MISA, GHN, VietQR. Data stays in sync across platforms instantly.

architecture.title: One platform for your entire operation
architecture.subtitle: From sales, inventory and customers to automation — everything connects in one system, with no more scattered data.
architecture.salesDesc: Orders from stores, your website and marketplaces in one place.
architecture.inventoryDesc: Accurate stock levels with out-of-stock alerts.
architecture.crmDesc: Purchase history, customer care and appointment reminders.
architecture.automationDesc: Repetitive workflows run on their own, to the right person at the right time.
architecture.securityDesc: Data is encrypted and role-based, keeping your business information safe at all times.

solutions.title: Tailored solutions for every industry
solutions.subtitle: Every industry has its own quirks; DXFlow is built to adapt and optimize for each specific workflow.
solutions.spaDesc: Automate 90% of booking, reminders and returning-customer care via Zalo OA.
solutions.spaImgAlt: Spa staff using DXFlow software at the reception desk

items.title: Retail
items.description: Accurate inventory, stock forecasting and instant GHN/AhaMove shipping integration.

items.title: Marketing agency
items.description: Centralized project management, automated reporting and efficient staff allocation.

partners.label: Trusted by and integrated with Vietnam's leading platforms

testimonials.title: Trusted by small and medium businesses to run every day
testimonials.subtitle: From spas and retail to marketing agencies — DXFlow helps thousands of teams do less and achieve more.

items.quote: DXFlow replaced almost all of our reminder and returning-customer care work. Our receptionists now focus on serving guests at the counter, and our return rate has clearly increased.
Real-time inventory sync between Sapo and our actual warehouse ended our overselling problems. End-of-day reports run themselves — no more manual data entry.
The software assigns tasks and compiles campaign reports for each client automatically. The team is far less stressed, and we've taken on more projects without rushing to hire.

cta.title: Ready to level up your business?
cta.subtitle: Join 1,000+ small and medium businesses already operating more efficiently with DXFlow.
cta.note: No credit card required · Free process consultation
